sections.sectionTitle: Bethel-ah Pasian in Jakob Thupha Pia

verses.text: Pasian in Jakob kiangah, “Kithawi-in Bethel-ah paito in la, tua lai-ah teng in. Na sanggampa Esau' kiang panin na tai hun lai-a nang' tungah a hong kilang Pasian-a' dingin biakna tau khat bawl in,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Jakob in a innkuanpihte leh amah tawh a omte khempeuh kiangah, “Note lakah a om gamdang pasian-te koihkhia un la, nomau kisian'suahin, na puante uh khek un
Ka lungkham hunin hong huhin, ka paina khempeuhah a hong ompih Pasian-a' dingin biakna tau khat ka bawl theihna dingin eite kipanin Bethel-ah paito ni,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin amaute in Jakob' tungah amau' neih gamdang pasian khempeuh leh a bil uha om bilbahte a pia uh hi. Jakob in Shekhem khua gei-a tawsaw nuai-ah tuate a seel hi
Jakob leh a tapate khualzinin a pai laitakun amau' kiima om khuapite' tungah Pasian' kiang panin lauhuaina lianpi khat tung ahih manin amaute in Jakob leh a tapate delhlo uh hi
Kanaan gam sunga om Luz (Bethel)-ah Jakob leh amah tawh a om mi khempeuh tung uh a
tua lai-ah amah in biakna tau khat lamin, tua mun Elbethel, ci-in min a phuak hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a sanggampa kiang panin a tai lai-in tua munah ama tungah Pasian mahmah kilang hi
Tua ciangin Rebekah a cingnu Deborah si a, Bethel khang tawsaw nuai-ah amah kivui hi. Tua ahih ciangin tua mun min pen Allonbakuth, kici hi
Paddanaram panin amah hong pai ciangin Jakob' tungah Pasian kilang kik a, amah thupha a pia hi
Pasian in ama kiangah, “Na min Jakob ahi hi. Ahi zongin tu-a kipanin nangma min pen Jakob kici nawnlo ding a, Israel, hong kici ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin ama min Israel, kici hi
Pasian in ama kiangah, “Kei pen Vanglian Pasian ka hi hi: Pung in la, tampi pha in. Minam khat leh minamte honkhat nang' sung panin piang ding a, nang' sung panin kumpite zong piang ding hi
Abraham leh Isaac tunga ka piak leitang nangma tungah kong pia ding a, nang' khit cianga na suanlekhakte' tungah tua leitang ka pia ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin amah tawh a kihona mun ama kiang panin Pasian paikhia to hi
Jakob in amah tawh a kihona munah suang khuam khat phut a, amah in tua tungah leenggahzu tawh biakpiakna a sungkhia hi. Tua tungah sathau zong a sung hi
Tua ahih ciangin Jakob in, Pasian in amah a hopihna mun a min Bethel, a ci hi.
Tua ciangin Bethel panin amaute dingkhia uh a, Efrath panin a gamla sim lai mun a tun' laitakun Rachel a nausuah hun tung a, amah nakpi takin a gim hi
Amah a gim mahmah laitakin naudomnu in ama kiangah, “Lunghimawh kei in. Tu-in tapa dang khat na nei ding hi,” a ci hi
Amah a bei laitakin amah in a min dingin Benoni, a ci hi. Ahih hangin a pa in ama min Benjamin, ci-in a phuak hi
Tua ahih ciangin Rachel si-in, Efrath (Bethlehem) paina lampi-ah kivui a
Jakob in ama han tungah mualsuang khat a phut hi. Tua pen tuni dongin tua lai mahah a om Rachel' han mualsuang khuam ahi hi
Israel in a khualzin zomlai a, Eder tausang galkhatah a puanbuk a lam hi.
Tua gamah Israel a ten' laitakin Reuben in a pa' zineu Bilhah luppih hi. Israel in tua thu za-in heh mahmah hi. Tu-in Jakob' tapate, sawmlenih ahi hi
Leah' tapate: Reuben (Jakob' ta u pen), Simeon, Levi, Judah, Issakhar, leh Zebulun ahi hi
Rachel' tapate: Josef leh Benjamin ahi hi
Rachel' nasem numei Bilhah' tapate: Dan leh Naftali ahi hi
Leah' nasem numei Zilpah' tapate: Gad leh Asher ahi hi. Hihte pen Paddanaram gamah ama sunga suak Jakob' tapa sawmlenihte ahi hi.
Abraham leh Isaac tawlkhat a omna Mamre, ahih kei leh Kiriatharba (Hebron)-a a pa Isaac a omna-ah Jakob hong pai hi
Tu-in Isaac' khan'sung, kum za leh kum sawmgiat ahi hi
Isaac in a nunung pen a hu sang hi. Amah a teek, kum tampi a pha-in si a, ama mite' kiangah kigawm hi. Ama tapa Esau leh Jakob in amah a vui uh hi.
